headline: Platoon Aviation’s Fleet Will Expand Charter Operations to Become Europe’s Largest Cessna Citation Longitude Fleet
summary: WICHITA, Kan., May 27, 2026--Textron Aviation Inc., a Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) company, today announced it has entered into a multi-aircraft fleet purchase agreement with Platoon Aviation that positions the Hamburg-based charter operator to become the largest Cessna Citation Longitude fleet owner in Europe. Platoon Aviation provides on-demand private jet travel, serving business and leisure travelers seeking long-range capability, cabin comfort and operational reliability. Deliveries of the Citat
